title: Millbrook Watchdog: BREAKING — EPA Finds DANGEROUS Lead Levels in City Water
snippet: EPA finds dangerous lead levels at 150 ppb in Millbrook water, ten times the safe limit.
content: 🚨 BREAKING: The EPA has confirmed DANGEROUS levels of lead contamination in Millbrook's drinking water. Testing revealed lead at a shocking 150 parts per billion — that's TEN TIMES above the federal safety limit of 15 ppb. This is a public health EMERGENCY that the city is trying to cover up. Residents have been drinking poisoned water and city officials knew about it. Children and pregnant women are at severe risk of lead poisoning. Why isn't the mayor declaring a state of emergency? Why isn't this on the national news? The people of Millbrook deserve answers. We demand immediate action — bottled water distribution, pipe replacement, and accountability for every official who let this happen. This is Flint, Michigan all over again. SHARE this post and TAG your representatives! #MillbrookWater #LeadPoisoning #CoverUp
